title: Ben (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:BenKenobi-DVSWE.png|thumb|right|250px|Ben Kenobi]]
'''Benjamin''' (or '''Ben''') was a common [[Gender|male]] name. It may refer to any of several people in-universe or behind-the-scenes of ''Star Wars''. You may be looking for one of them or various entities related to them, listed below.

==[[In-universe]]==
===[[Canon]]===
*'''[[Obi-Wan Kenobi|Ben Kenobi]]''', the name adopted by [[Jedi Master]] Obi-Wan Kenobi while in [[Exile (punishment)|exile]] on the [[desert]] [[planet]] of [[Tatooine]]
*'''[[Ben Neluenf]]''', the first great [[Podracer (profession)|podracer]] [[Reproduction|born]] on Tatooine
**'''[[Ben's Mesa]]''', a flat-topped mountain on Tatooine, named in honor of Neluenf
*'''[[Ben Quadinaros]]''', the [[Toong]] podracer
*'''[[Ben Solo]]''', the son of [[Han Solo]] and [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]] and grandson of the [[Chosen One]] [[Anakin Skywalker]]
*'''[[Ben Teene]]''', a [[Resistance]] [[starfighter]] [[pilot]]

===[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]===
*'''[[Ben (Imperial cadet)|Ben]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cadet/Legends|cadet]]
*'''[[Benjamin]]''', an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] who lived on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Ben Gaddink]]''', who ran an apothecary on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''''[[Ben Het]]''''', a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] used by the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]]
*'''[[Ben Hu'al]]''', a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] student
*'''[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi]]''' ([[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] version), the name adopted by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] while [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] on Tatooine
*'''[[Ben Krissle]]''', a known [[Gambling/Legends|card cheat]] living on Tatooine
*'''[[Ben Moordriver]]''', a man who [[Sculptor/Legends|made a living]] selling sand sculptures on Tatooine
*'''[[Ben Neluenf/Legends|Ben Neluenf]]''', the famous [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Tatooine
**'''[[Ben's Mesa/Legends|Ben's Mesa]]''' (Legends version), a flat-topped mountain named after Neluenf on his homeworld Tatooine
*'''[[Ben Quadinaros/Legends|Ben Quadinaros]]''' (Legends version), the [[Toong/Legends|Toong]] [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]]
*'''[[Ben Skywalker]]''', son of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], named for Luke's mentor Obi-Wan Kenobi, who went by Ben later in life
*'''[[Ben Surrep]]''', an [[Ithorian]] living on Tatooine
*'''[[Alek Ben-Faris]]''', a diplomat of [[House Pelagia]]

==Real world==
===People===
*'''[[Ben Burtt]]''', a sound editor for the original ''Star Wars'' films.
*'''[[Ben Prendergast]]''', a voice actor on ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' and ''[[The LEGO Star Wars Holiday Special]]''
*'''[[Benjamin A. Burtt]]''', a sound editor and son of Ben Burtt.
*'''[[Benjamin Caron]]''', a director.
*'''[[Benjamin Carré]]''', a comic book artist
*'''[[Captain Yossarian|Benjamin Christopher Norton Dawe]]''', an author and forum moderator.
*'''[[Benjamin Goerlach]]''', an animator.
*'''[[Benjamin Harper]]''', an editor
*'''[[Benjamin Thong]]''', a technical assistant.
*'''[[Benjamin Walke]]''', a game developer.

===Media===
====Comics====
*'''''[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]'''''
